summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Pipeline page production spec. 21/22 features verified successfully. All 5 sections present (Header, Hero Card, Momentum Insight, Priority Board, Pipeline List). All NEGATIVE tests passed - NO carousel arrows, NO counter, NO filter pills, NO 'Also' peek row, NO 'View details' button. One minor issue: Header h1 uses Manrope font instead of -apple-system/SF Pro Text/Inter (global CSS override).

issues: Header h1 uses Manrope font instead of -apple-system/SF Pro Text/Inter. The FONT constant is correctly defined in PipelinePage.js but a global CSS rule may be overriding it.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix header h1 font-family to use -apple-system/SF Pro Text/Inter instead of Manrope (may need to add !important or inline style)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing data (5 schools for Emma Chen)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline page production spec fully implemented. Single hero card (no carousel), 5-section layout verified. All negative tests passed.
